title: Mule 1
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Mule 1''''' was a [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''Mule 1'', one of five craft from [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] ''[[Mule]]'', was tasked to recover usable parts from an enemy supply depot destroyed in the [[Argoon system/Legends|Argoon system]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was among pilots responsible for providing [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] cover while group ''Mule'' completed docking operations with various [[Cargo container/Legends|Cargo containers]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
